summary: Iteration 2 testing completed successfully. CRITICAL FIXES VERIFIED: Catalog page now loads without Select.Item errors and /api/orders API accepts orders without 422 errors. Backend achieving 100% success rate. Frontend authentication, dashboard, and product browsing working correctly. One cart persistence issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Products not persisting in cart after adding - cart shows empty even after add to cart clicks
ui_bugs.details: CartContext appears correct, may be localStorage or state management issue

integration_issues.issue: Cart state not maintained between page navigations

passed_tests: CRITICAL FIX: Catalog page loads without Select.Item errors
CRITICAL FIX: /api/orders API accepts orders without 422 errors
Backend APIs: 100% success rate (13/13 tests passed)
Homepage loads with proper navigation and branding
Authentication system: registration and login modals working
User dashboard displays VetPoints, orders, and statistics correctly
Product catalog displays 2 products with proper filtering
Category and stock filters (Select components) working without errors
action_item_for_main_agent: Cart persistence issue: Products added to cart are not maintained in cart state. Investigate CartContext localStorage integration or state management between page navigations. All critical fixes from iteration 1 are now working correctly.
